title: OpenClaw Agent Ops Hardening Skill
copyText:
Install:
curl -L https://heyclau.de/downloads/skills/openclaw-agent-ops-hardening.zip -o openclaw-agent-ops-hardening.zip && unzip -o openclaw-agent-ops-hardening.zip -d ./openclaw-agent-ops-hardening

Usage:
Use this skill to move OpenClaw agents from prototype state to secure and monitorable production operation.

Asset:
# Trigger
"Run the OpenClaw ops hardening skill for this deployment."

# Required output
1) Threat model and trust boundaries
2) Permission matrix for tools/actions
3) Runtime hardening changes
4) Incident response checklist
detailMarkdown:
# OpenClaw Agent Ops Hardening Skill
Harden OpenClaw agent environments with secure defaults, policy boundaries, tool governance, and incident response playbooks.
**Category:** skills
**Author:** JSONbored
**Verification:** draft
**Download trust:** first-party
**Tags:** `openclaw` `ai-agents` `security` `hardening` `operations`

## Install
```bash
curl -L https://heyclau.de/downloads/skills/openclaw-agent-ops-hardening.zip -o openclaw-agent-ops-hardening.zip && unzip -o openclaw-agent-ops-hardening.zip -d ./openclaw-agent-ops-hardening
```

## Usage
Use this skill to move OpenClaw agents from prototype state to secure and monitorable production operation.
